title: Regulations
full_text:
6.2.1.1 Regulations
Regulations
1) Service water systems shall be designed in accordance with the relevant
provincial, territorial or municipal building regulations or, in the absence of such
regulations, or where service water systems are not covered by such regulations, with
the NPC.

sentences.text: Service water systems shall be designed in accordance with the relevant provincial, territorial or municipal building regulations or, in the absence of such regulations, or where service water systems are not covered by such regulations, with the NPC.
